params.extraction_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"opportunity_type": {"type": "string", "description": "Type: Tender, Grant, Course, Contract, Market Listing, Funding, Scholarship, Other"}, "title": {"type": "string", "description": "Official name or title of the opportunity"}, "organization": {"type": "string", "description": "Organization offering the opportunity"}, "description": {"type": "string", "description": "Detailed description"}, "eligibility": {"type": "string", "description": "Who can apply and key requirements"}, "amount_value": {"type": "string", "description": "Financial amount if applicable"}, "currency": {"type": "string", "description": "Currency (USD, KES, UGX, ZWL, GHS, ETB, etc)"}, "deadline": {"type": "string", "description": "Application or event deadline date"}, "application_url": {"type": "string", "description": "Direct link to apply"}, "contact_email": {"type": "string", "description": "Contact email"}, "contact_phone": {"type": "string", "description": "Contact phone"}, "key_benefits": {"type": "string", "description": "Main benefits and outcomes"}, "countries": {"type": "string", "description": "Targeted countries or regions"}, "sectors": {"type": "string", "description": "Agriculture sectors (crops, livestock, agritech, etc)"}}, "required": ["opportunity_type", "title", "organization", "deadline"]}
params.prompt: Extract detailed information about agricultural opportunities (tenders, grants, courses, contracts, market listings) for East African and SADC farmers. Focus on: opportunity type, eligibility requirements, funding amount, application deadline, contact information, and key benefits. Also extract any references to opportunities in {{1__COL$B}}
